login.title: Enterprise AI Chat System
login.resetDesc: Enter your username and a reset link will be sent to your email (manual accounts only).

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.invalidLink: Invalid reset link, please request a new one.
resetPassword.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters

sidebar.importShareDesc: Paste the share link you received. The system will copy the conversation to your account.
sidebar.importError: Import failed, please check the link
sidebar.importInvalidToken: Please enter a valid share link or token
sidebar.adPwNote: AD domain password cannot be changed here. Please use the AD management interface.
sidebar.passwordTooShort: New password must be at least 6 characters

chat.suggestion1: Write a work report for me
chat.suggestion4: Explain the key points of this document
chat.uploadNoAudioPerm: No audio upload permission. Please contact your administrator.
chat.uploadAudioTooLarge: {{filename}} exceeds the audio file limit of {{audioMaxMb}}MB
chat.uploadNoTextPerm: No text file upload permission. Please contact your administrator.
chat.uploadTextTooLarge: {{filename}} exceeds the text file limit of {{textMaxMb}}MB

topbar.kbEmpty: No knowledge bases (create and upload documents first)

users.title: User Management
users.searchPlaceholder: Search by name / employee ID / email / dept / profit center / section / group

form.name: Name
form.mcpDifyRoleNote: Determines which MCP tools and DIFY knowledge bases this user can access
form.followRolePolicy: — Follow role policy (no limit if unset) —
form.dataPolicyNote: Once set, this user's data queries will use this policy, overriding the role policy
form.budgetOverride: Usage Budget (personal override, blank = use role setting)
form.skillPerms: ✨ Skill Permissions (personal override, null = use role)
form.kbPerms: 📚 KB / Deep Research Permissions (personal override, null = use role)
form.orgData: Organization Data (auto-synced from ERP when employee ID is saved)
form.creationMethodNote: This field is auto-recorded by the system. LDAP account passwords are managed by AD.

users.syncOrgConfirm: Sync organization data for all users?

audit.title: Audit Logs
audit.sensitiveAlert: {{count}} sensitive keyword record(s) found in this query

keywords.title: Sensitive Keywords
keywords.desc: When user messages contain sensitive keywords, the system will automatically log and notify the administrator.

db.title: History Cleanup Settings
db.exportDesc: Download the current SQLite database backup file.
db.importWarning: Importing will overwrite all existing data. This is irreversible! Please ensure you have a backup.
db.importConfirm: ⚠️ Importing will overwrite existing data. Continue?
db.backupPathDesc: Set the server-side backup directory (for Docker, use container path e.g. /app/backups).
db.backupScheduleDesc: Automatically backup the database at the configured path. Backup path must be set first.
db.dataCleanupDesc: Conversation records beyond the retention period will be deleted. Sensitive conversations can be kept longer for auditing.
db.cleanupSettingsSaved: Cleanup settings saved, scheduled daily at {{hour}}:00
db.cleanupConfirm:
Clear conversation data beyond the retention period?
Normal: {{retentionDays}} days, Sensitive: {{sensitiveDays}} days.

llm.title: LLM Model Settings
llm.ociNote: OCI credentials are stored encrypted with AES-256-GCM.

notes.gemini: API Key can be left blank to use env GEMINI_API_KEY; if filled, it is encrypted in DB and takes priority
notes.azure: Fill in base URL (e.g. https://fl-aoai-eus.openai.azure.com), the SDK will automatically build the full path
notes.oci: Uses RSA-SHA256 signature authentication, Private Key PEM encrypted in DB. Model role can be Chat / Embedding / Rerank
notes.roles: Chat for conversation, Embedding/Rerank for KB retrieval, TTS for text-to-speech, STT for speech-to-text
notes.encryption: Stored encrypted with AES-256-GCM in DB, decrypted server-side, never displayed in plaintext on frontend

form.azureEndpointNote: Base URL only, do not include /openai/deployments/...
form.cohereModelNote: Enter Cohere model name, e.g. embed-multilingual-v3.0
form.compartmentNote: Optional, leave blank to use tenancy root
form.ociEncryptNote: OCI credentials are encrypted with AES-256-GCM in DB.
form.ociKeepNote: Leave blank to keep existing settings
form.keepExisting: Leave blank to keep existing value
form.keepExistingKey: Leave blank to keep existing key
form.keepPrivateKey: Leave blank to keep existing Private Key

skills.title: Skill Market
skills.subtitle: Create and share AI Skills to enhance conversations
skills.importFailed: Import failed, please check the link

kb.deleteConfirm: Delete knowledge base "{{name}}"? All documents and vector data will be deleted.
kb.noKbCanCreate: No knowledge bases yet. Click "Create Knowledge Base" to start.

createModal.title: Create Knowledge Base
createModal.descPlaceholder: Describe the purpose and scope of this knowledge base
createModal.dimHint: 💡 Dimensions cannot be changed after creation. 768 fits most cases; choose 1536 or 3072 for higher semantic precision (model support required).
createModal.nameRequired: Please enter a knowledge base name

docs.dropZoneText: Drag or click to upload documents
docs.dropZoneHint: Supports PDF · DOCX · PPTX · XLSX · TXT · CSV · JPG · PNG · GIF · WEBP (max 200 MB)
docs.deleteConfirm: Delete document "{{name}}" and all its chunks?

settings.strategyRegularDesc: Advanced text chunking mode with consistent rules for retrieval and summarization
settings.strategyParentChildDesc: Uses parent-child mode: child-chunks for retrieval, parent-chunks for full context
settings.removeUrls: Remove all URLs and email addresses
settings.modeVectorDesc: Finds text segments most similar via embedding vectors
settings.modeFulltextDesc: Indexes all words to allow arbitrary keyword queries
settings.modeHybridDesc: Runs full-text and vector search simultaneously with reranking
settings.rerankAutoNote: When "Auto" is selected, the system uses an active rerank model automatically.
settings.ocrModelNote: Gemini model used for PDF full-text understanding and embedded image OCR in Word/Excel/PPT.
settings.parseModeNote: Applies to PDF · DOCX · XLSX. PPTX and images are always text-only. Can be overridden per upload.

share.requestPublicDesc: Once public, all users can search this knowledge base
share.requestPublicConfirm: Request to make this knowledge base public? It requires admin approval.
share.userSearchPlaceholder: Search by name / account / employee ID
share.permDesc: Use: Can call this KB in conversations but not visible in the KB market. Edit: Visible in KB market, can view and edit documents.

search.title: Recall Test
search.subtitle: Test retrieval effectiveness based on a query text
search.placeholder: Enter text, preferably a short declarative sentence.

history.hint: Showing last 100 records (chat queries and recall tests)

factoryLang.title: Factory Language Settings
factoryLang.desc: Configure the UI language for each factory. Users will automatically use their factory's language after login.

scheduledTask.title: Scheduled Tasks
scheduledTask.runTimeout: Execution timed out, please refresh manually to check results

form.mp3Note: MP3 Voice: AI response will be automatically converted to audio via TTS skill. Requires TTS model (model_role=tts) configured in admin.
form.recipients: Recipients (task owner's email is automatically included)
form.noExtraRecipients: No extra recipients set, only sent to account email
form.toolsUsedHint: {{tools_used}} expands to the list of skills/KBs called this run

scheduledTask.promptHint: Type / to quickly select tools, or go to the Tools tab to insert syntax.

tools.hint: Click Insert to add syntax to the Prompt (at cursor). Skills/KBs will be called automatically at execution time and results injected into the Prompt for AI analysis.

mcp.title: MCP Server Management
mcp.desc: Configure Model Context Protocol servers to enable AI tool calls
mcp.subtitle: Configure Model Context Protocol servers to enable AI tool calls
mcp.noToolsSynced: No tools synced yet, click the sync button

form.name: Name *
form.apiKeyPlaceholder: Bearer token, leave blank for no auth
form.modeInjectDesc: MCP tool results injected to LLM for summarized response
form.modeAnswerDesc: MCP tool results output directly, bypassing LLM (raw data preserved)
form.injectDesc: MCP tool results injected to LLM for summarized response
form.answerDesc: MCP tool results output directly, bypassing LLM (raw data preserved)
form.transportAuto: Try each transport in order and remember the one that works
form.transportHttpPost: Direct POST JSON-RPC to URL (most universal)
form.transportHttpSse: GET /sse for SSE connection, POST /message for requests (legacy MCP)
form.transportStreamable: Single POST endpoint, response can be JSON or SSE (MCP 2025 spec)
form.transportStdio: Spawn local subprocess, communicate via stdin/stdout (local MCP)
form.commandHint: Full command, quote arguments with spaces
form.isPublic: Public (requires Admin approval to be visible to all users)
form.commandRequired: Command is required for stdio mode

roles.title: Role Management
roles.noRoles: No roles yet, click Add Role
roles.desc: Assign MCP servers / DIFY knowledge bases to roles, then assign roles to users. Roles marked ★ are default roles applied to new users automatically.

form.setDefault: Set as default role (auto-applied to new users, unique system-wide)
form.allowCodeSkill: Allow Code Runner Skill (IT dept only)
form.dataPolicyNote: Once applied, users in this role will have their data queries filtered by policy rules
form.budgetNote: Period is current day/Mon-Sun/current month. User personal settings override role settings. Admins are unlimited.

roles.deleteConfirm: Delete role "{{name}}"? Users assigned this role will be unbound.

aiDash.title: AI Dashboard
aiDash.noTopicsAdmin: No topics yet — go to Designer
aiDash.queryPlaceholder: Describe what you want to query in natural language...
aiDash.thresholdHint: Leave blank to use design defaults
aiDash.selectDesign: Select a query design from the left
aiDash.goToDesigner: Or go to Designer to create a new query

sqModal.namePlaceholder: e.g. Abnormal Work Orders by Factory
sqModal.questionPlaceholder: Describe the query in natural language (AI generates SQL each run)
sqModal.questionHint: User-selected parameters are prepended to this statement before each run
sqModal.detectedHint: If checked, users select values before each run
sqModal.detectedSelected: {{count}} param(s) selected → adjust input type in Params tab
sqModal.noDetected: (No filterable columns detected in SQL — add manually in Params tab)
sqModal.noParamsHint: Go to Basic Info to check auto-detected columns, or add manually
sqModal.paramHint: Before each run, users select filter values and AI regenerates SQL accordingly.
sqModal.typeDynamicDate: Dynamic Date (this month / last N days...)
sqModal.minValueFilter: Show only values > (0 to exclude zeros)
sqModal.noColsHint: No columns available. Enter column names manually or re-save after running a query.

board.title: Dashboard
board.deleteConfirmMsg: Delete dashboard "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.
board.selectDashboard: Select a dashboard from the left, or create a new one
board.selectDashboardHint: Combine multiple saved charts into one dashboard for a quick KPI overview
board.noQueriesDesc: Go to AI Dashboard, run a query, then click "Save"
board.availableQueries: {{count}} available queries — click the button below to enter edit mode
board.addFromAbove: Select a query from the "+ Add Query..." dropdown above
board.noQueriesEditHint: No queries yet — go to AI Dashboard to run and save a query
board.noManageAccess: This dashboard is read-only (no manage access)

qpModal.fillParams: Please fill in the query parameters

research.title: Deep Research
research.questionPlaceholder: Enter the topic or question you want to research in depth
research.taskSourceHint: All sub-topics will use these sources by default; each topic can override individually
research.usingKb: Will prioritize your knowledge base data for research
research.usingWeb: Will use Google Search for web research
research.topicSourceLabel: Data sources for this sub-topic (overrides task setting)
research.successMsg1: You can continue chatting. A notification will appear when research is complete.
research.successMsg2: Research progress will also be shown in the conversation.
research.errorGenFail: Failed to generate plan, please try again
research.errorStartFail: Failed to start research, please try again
research.prevResearchHint: Select completed research as background context
research.sqHintPlaceholder: Enter a hint or direction for this sub-question...
research.progressHint: You can view the report in chat after research completes
research.errorNoRerun: Please select at least one sub-question to re-run

tokenStats.title: My Token Usage Trend
tokenStats.noData: No token usage during this period
